---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "【BUG】"
labels: ''
assignees: silkcrestapp

---

### 🚨 Problem
Describe what is broken and what *should* be happening instead.

### 🔍 Steps to Reproduce / Context
- Where is this happening? (File path, UI component, or API endpoint)
- What triggers it? (e.g., "Happens when clicking save without a title")

### 🛠️ Proposed Fix (Optional)
Any initial thoughts on how to fix it so you don't have to re-solve the puzzle later.
